_comment: Role definitions with capacity factors and activities
_note: Referenced by users (via roleId) and capacity records. Single source of truth for role metadata.

roles.subtitle: Sets Goals
roles.description: Defines product vision, sets priorities, and articulates goals

roles.subtitle: Removes Blockers
roles.description: Facilitates team dynamics, removes impediments, coaches team members

roles.subtitle: Decides What
roles.description: Plans features and work items, decides scope and priorities

roles.subtitle: Builds & Designs Dishes
roles.description: Architect and senior engineer, designs systems and leads development

roles.subtitle: Designs Experience
roles.description: UX/UI designer, creates user experience and interface designs

roles.subtitle: Writes Instructions
roles.description: Technical writer, documentation specialist, creates comprehensive guides

roles.subtitle: QA/Testing
roles.description: Quality assurance specialist, ensures product quality through testing

roles.subtitle: DevOps
roles.description: DevOps engineer, manages infrastructure, CI/CD, and operational systems

roles.subtitle: Cloud & Infrastructure
roles.description: Cloud architect, manages infrastructure, scaling, and platform services

roles.subtitle: Security
roles.description: Security engineer, manages security, compliance, and risk mitigation

roles.subtitle: Data/AI
roles.description: Data engineer/scientist, builds data pipelines and AI models

roles.subtitle: Mobile/Apps
roles.description: Mobile/app developer, builds client applications and mobile experiences

roles.subtitle: Automation
roles.description: Automation engineer, builds testing automation and deployment tools

roles.subtitle: Support
roles.description: Customer/technical support specialist, resolves issues and supports operations

roles.subtitle: Portfolio Adviser
roles.description: Strategic advisor, provides guidance on portfolio and organizational direction

roles.subtitle: Consulting
roles.description: Consultant and strategic advisor, provides expertise across domains
